summary: Completed comprehensive authentication and authorization testing for CSPM tool. All backend APIs and frontend role-based access control working perfectly. Tested JWT authentication, role hierarchy (admin>analyst>viewer), protected endpoints, and UI navigation restrictions.
passed_tests: POST /api/auth/login with admin/Admin@123 returns JWT token
POST /api/auth/login with analyst/Analyst@123 returns JWT token
POST /api/auth/login with viewer/Viewer@123 returns JWT token
POST /api/auth/login with wrong password returns 401
Protected endpoints return 401 without token
POST /api/scan requires analyst+ role (works with admin/analyst, fails with viewer)
GET /api/scan/results works with any authenticated role
GET /api/attack/mappings returns ATT&CK technique mappings with combined paths
GET /api/threat/live returns geo-located threat events
GET /api/threat/stats returns top attacking countries and threat types
GET /api/scan/history returns scan history from MongoDB
GET /api/notifications returns notification list
PUT /api/remediation/{findingId} updates remediation status
Login page renders and accepts credentials for all roles
After login, sidebar shows role-appropriate navigation items
Admin role can access all 10 navigation items
Analyst role can access scan, executive view, export (but not notifications)
Viewer role cannot access scan, executive view, export, or notifications pages
ATT&CK Map page navigation works
Threat Map page navigation works
Executive View page navigation works
Remediation page navigation works
Notifications page navigation works (admin only)
Logout functionality works correctly
Role-based UI restrictions properly enforced

success_percentage.frontend: 100% (all role-based UI navigation and restrictions working)
